demo.title: token-pick.sh
demo.code:
# At most one token pick + one prediction-market pick
aeon-token-pick

# Each pick: thesis / entry / kill / sizing / horizon
# Empty days emit a SKIP with reasoning

setup: Chain after `aeon-token-movers` and `aeon-monitor-polymarket` so the pick has fresh candidates
Tune sizing buckets to your stack in the config
